title: Lily's Garden Friends
synopsis: Lily discovers that making friends in the garden is as simple as being kind and sharing. When she meets a lonely butterfly, she learns that friendship can bloom anywhere in nature.

pages.text: Lily loved playing in her backyard garden. The flowers were bright yellow and red. The grass was soft and green. Today, Lily wanted to find a new friend to play with.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes stands in a colorful garden with bright yellow and red flowers, green grass, surrounded by nature in bright sunny playground style with primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Lily standing in a beautiful garden with colorful flowers

pages.text: As Lily walked through the garden, she saw a small blue butterfly sitting alone on a flower. The butterfly looked sad. 'Hello, little butterfly,' said Lily softly. 'Do you want to be my friend?'

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes gently approaching a small blue butterfly on a flower in a joyful energetic garden setting with bright primary colors and inclusive friendship activities
illustration.alt: Lily talking to a blue butterfly on a flower

pages.text: The butterfly fluttered its wings happily. It seemed to say yes! Lily smiled big. She had found her new friend. The butterfly landed gently on Lily's hand.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes smiling widely with a blue butterfly perched on her outstretched hand in bright sunny playground style with white space and joyful energetic colors
illustration.alt: Lily smiling with the butterfly on her hand

pages.text: Lily and her butterfly friend played all morning. They danced around the sunflowers. They played hide and seek behind the big green leaves. The butterfly showed Lily where the sweetest flowers grew.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes dancing and playing with a blue butterfly among tall sunflowers and green leaves in bright sunny playground style with primary colors and friendship activities
illustration.alt: Lily and the butterfly playing among sunflowers

pages.text: When Lily got thirsty, she shared her water with the butterfly. When the butterfly got tired, Lily made a soft bed of flower petals. They took care of each other like good friends do.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sharing water with a butterfly resting on colorful flower petals in an inclusive joyful energetic garden scene with bright primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Lily sharing water and making a petal bed for the butterfly

pages.text: As the sun began to set, Lily waved goodbye to her butterfly friend. 'See you tomorrow!' she called. The butterfly danced in the air as if to say, 'Yes, see you tomorrow, friend!' Lily skipped inside, happy to have made a new friend in her garden.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes waving goodbye to a blue butterfly flying in the air during sunset in bright sunny playground style with primary colors, white space, and laughter-filled friendship activities
illustration.alt: Lily waving goodbye to her butterfly friend at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: Where did Lily meet her new friend?
questions.explanation: Lily met the butterfly in her backyard garden while she was playing among the flowers.

questions.question: What color was the butterfly?
questions.explanation: The butterfly was blue and was sitting alone on a flower when Lily first saw it.

questions.question: How did Lily take care of her friend?
choices: shared water and made a petal bed
questions.explanation: Lily shared her water with the butterfly and made a soft bed of flower petals when it was tired.

questions.question: What did they play together?
questions.explanation: Lily and the butterfly played hide and seek behind the big green leaves in the garden.
